subject: Revised outlook — Quantum-X800 switch orders
body:
Dear Meridian procurement team,

Due to a production line changeover for Quantum-X800 switch (NVI-IS-2889),
shipments against PO-1124 are expected to slip approximately 2 weeks
beyond the committed date. We apologize for the disruption and will confirm a
recovery schedule by Friday.

subject: Delivery update: PO-2007
body:
Hello,

Heads-up that PO-2007 (44x 4U 8-GPU air-cooled server)
is running about 10 days behind plan due to component shortages on our side.
Revised packing list to follow.

subject: CDU production constraint notice
body:
To our valued customers,

We are experiencing a supply constraint affecting CRAH unit units
(part family MOT-CS-). Open orders may be delayed by up to 3 weeks.
Our team will follow up with order-level impacts next week.

subject: Genset assembly backlog — schedule risk
body:
Dear partner,

Engine supply issues have pushed our 3MW diesel genset assembly backlog out by
roughly 30 days. Orders placed after March are most affected.

subject: Q3 allocation adjustment
body:
Allocation notice:

Your Q3 allocation for DGX B200 system systems has been reduced by 15%
due to upstream HBM supply constraints. Affected order quantities will be
confirmed in the next allocation cycle.

subject: Expedite confirmed — PO-1928
body:
Good news: we secured an earlier test slot and PO-1928
(Substation transformer) is now tracking 3 weeks ahead of the revised schedule.
Updated shipping documents attached.

subject: Pull-in accepted for PO-2447
body:
Confirming the requested pull-in: PO-2447 will ship
7 days earlier than committed.

subject: Port congestion advisory — trans-Pacific eastbound
body:
Advisory: vessel bunching at Kaohsiung and LA/Long Beach is adding
7-10 days to trans-Pacific ocean transits this month. Shipments from Taiwan
origins are most affected. Air capacity remains available at premium rates.

subject: Customs hold — inbound consignment
body:
One inbound consignment for PO-1315
is held for customs valuation review at the port of entry. Typical clearance
for this review type is 5-8 business days.

subject: QA hold: RAR-PDU-6341
body:
Quality notification: a torque-spec deviation was found in a recent
Rack PDU metered lot (RAR-PDU-6341). Outbound shipments are held
pending re-inspection, estimated 6 days.

subject: Invoice reminder — August statement
body: Friendly reminder that invoice batch #88231 is due at the end of the month.

subject: Webinar: liquid cooling best practices
body: Join our webinar next Thursday on rear-door heat exchanger deployment patterns.
